title: Connector MISP Feed Rosti
description: OpenCTI MISP Feed Connector with specific fixes for feeds like Rosti that regenerate their manifest daily with incorrect timestamps.
short_description: The OpenCTI MISP Feed Rosti connector imports MISP feed data into OpenCTI with real date filtering using Event.date from actual JSON files instead of unreliable manifest metadata. It supports UUID-based deduplication, robust per-event error handling, and safe field access. The connector creates reports, indicators, and observables from MISP events, handles TLP markings, MITRE ATT&CK patterns, and supports both URL and S3 source types.
